arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: UDCA Tenerife vs. Real Madrid; Liga F
arts.sum: After qualifying for the Champions League group stage in the midweek game against Sporting, Real Madrid are playing UDCA Tenerife in the 4th matchday of Liga F. The surprise in the squad list is the absence of Melanie Leupolz who is reported to have got flu.

arts.ttl: Chelsea scouting Bundesliga star but Real Madrid also keen after Man Utd beat them to transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea are one of the clubs keeping an eye on RB Leipzig defender Castello Lukeba, though he’s just one of a number of names on their list. The talented 21-year-old looks an exciting prospect and is sure to continue to attract interest from top clubs around Europe, with Chelsea and Real Madrid both mentioned as […] The post Chelsea scouting Bundesliga star but Real Madrid also keen after Man Utd beat them to transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Conor Gallagher hailed by Atletico Madrid legend after flying start as Diego Simeone claim made
arts.sum: England international midfielder Conor Gallagher joined Atletico Madrid from Chelsea in August and has already made a big impact under manager Diego Simeone in Spain

arts.ttl: Nico Paz: “Carlo Ancelotti knows how to get the most out of his players”
arts.sum: Nico Paz spoke very highly of Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti in a recent interview, saying he knows how to get the best out of his players. Paz was asked about his time at Real Madrid and working under Carlo Ancelotti, about whom he only said good things: “Ancelotti was happy for me after the goal against Napoli, he knew what it meant to me.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible starting XI against Atlético Madrid in LaLiga
arts.sum: Ancelotti’s probable starting eleven for the derby includes: Courtois; Carvajal, Militao, Rüdiger, Mendy; Valverde, Tchouaméni, Modric, Bellingham; Rodrygo, and Vinícius . Mbappé's injury likely means Madrid will deploy four midfielders, with Vinicius and Rodrygo leading the attack.
